feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: 7th gen nostalgia
entry.content: It's well known among us gamers that the late 2000's~mid 2010's was ASS for gaming. Brown and piss aesthetic, overpriced DLC's, birth of microtransactions, QTEs and cutscenes, etc. So how do we explain the fact that NORMALFAGs are nostalgic about the era and believe it's the golden age of gaming?

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Do people actually sleep with their smartwatch on? I tried one night and it was …
entry.content: Do people actually sleep with their smartwatch on? I tried one night and it was the most uncomfortable thing ever. I don't really give a shit about sleep metrics anyway. I doubt it would do me any good to know that stuff. I already have a fucked-up sleep schedule.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: GTA VI : NEW INFO DISCUSSION
entry.content: Grand Theft Auto VI redefines the concept of open-world (sandbox) gameplay. Explore the most massive, dense, and insane map ever created by Rockstar Games. Traverse the neon-lit streets of a pulsating Vice City, dominate dangerous swamps, crowded beaches, and realistic suburbs that cover the state of Leonida from end to end. Every inch of the scenery has been designed to deliver brutal immersion and total freedom. - Lucia and Jason: Cooperative gameplay and a duo of protagonists The main campaig

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: I've had PLENTY of time with this game (unlocked every skin, in the top echelon …
entry.content: I've had PLENTY of time with this game (unlocked every skin, in the top echelon of players) and you know what? I don't think a game has ever EARNED my hatred like this one. I've never played a game that holds such contempt for its players. The enemy design makes me want to punch a fucking hole in the wall. Those shitheads with maces and shields that bounce all over the place and react INSTANTLY to you The random level challenges you basically have to take because the rewards are so good can crea

entry.title: /mu/ Music: It's Great When You're Straight... Yeah
entry.content: This album is fucking awesome, better than Pills/Thrills, and that's a great record. It feels like the culmination of all of Britain's postwar music history up to and including Garage and Britpop, somehow distilling them into a freebase that makes it extremely addictive dance music. I'm shocked it hasn't been rediscovered yet en masse given it's basically the definitive 20th century British pop record.

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Buying my first car from a friend
entry.content: I'm planning to buy my first car and I've been looking around for options. Recently, a friend of mine let me know that he was selling his brother's car (which is under his brother's name). It's a 2008 Honda Civic; it looks pretty nice from the outside, and I had the opportunity to go for a ride in it for a few minutes and it felt good. From the outside, it looks like everything is okay, but I did notice a few things: the check engine light was on, the alignment was a bit off (it drifted to the r

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Redpill me on buying a new TV in 2026. I just want a big TV with a nice picture …
entry.content: Redpill me on buying a new TV in 2026. I just want a big TV with a nice picture that can stream and play games. All the minutiae of the different variations of LED screen go way over my head. And I don't want any voice control/Alexa shit if I can avoid it.

entry.title: /mu/ Music: went to a paul simon show today the first set was seven psalms album, which was …
entry.content: went to a paul simon show today the first set was seven psalms album, which was clearly the work of a man who sees death on the horizon. the lyric "two billion heartbeats and out" stuck with me second set was hits and some deep cuts. barring the obvious hits he played, some songs i enjoyed were "slip slidin away", "father and daughter" and "rene and georgette magritte with their dog after the war" he slipped in a crazy story about Johnny Ace shooting himself in the head by accident which drew ou

entry.content: /flg/ - F-List General #8341 This Pink Faggot Previous Thread: >>83673950 F-list is a website for people interested in erotic roleplaying, and creating character profiles to find like-minded partners with similar interests and fetishes to roleplay with. It features a webchat (which can be used for textual roleplaying), group forums and more kinks and depravity than you can memorize. The purpose of this thread is to serve as a place where roleplayers can freely share and advertise their profiles,

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Thinking of buying a NEV
entry.content: I am looking to buy a new car in the next couple of years. I never go on highways (no need) but need to haul large cargo on roads with speed limits around 30-35 mph and be relatively minimal tech wise. I was thinking about getting picrel (since it is perfect for my needs), since it has a 30-35 mph top speed (governed and able to maintain that speed uphill), RWD and optioned with HVAC (must for the heat), wipers, loading ramp and 16 kWH battery system with charging equipment. I don't really have

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Americans here do know that they would probably all fail if they took a driving …
entry.content: Americans here do know that they would probably all fail if they took a driving test in the U.K. or Europe, right? American tests are a joke.

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: See the numbers listed after each game title, those are called builds. Steam has…
entry.content: See the numbers listed after each game title, those are called builds. Steam has its own numbering system when a game is updated and their useful if you are pirating. Just go on steamdb, search up a game and click patches. I tend to cross reference the build numbers every couple months to check if there are any updates. Maybe if you export the file directory as a txt and paste it in grok, then the AI can tell you which builds are outdated. Also yes, you can add comments to windows file explorer

entry.title: /g/ Technology: CHINA WILL SOON LOSE ACCESS TO DUV MACHINE
entry.content: Huawei, SMIC, YMTC, and CXMT all rely on existing ASML DUV machines. The new MATCH ACT(H.R.8170) would bar the servicing and maintenance of these machines in China, effectively making them unrenewable. All chinese chips manufacturing including DDR5 will be severely limited and likely become completely dead soon

entry.content: /ceg/ - Imminent Capeshit Film Synergy Edition Post any expansion-related material (breast or butt expansion, weight gain, inflation to name a few) containing human or humanoid characters. Cartoon and vidya characters are permitted) All expansion must be focused on related material (characters from cartoons, games, comics, or anime). Have some fun, above all else. Any original content is appreciated! Edits, fics, and other pictures are all great. Boorus: https://curveybooru.com/index.php?p age=p

entry.title: /int/ International: I have arrived in Mexico City, from NYC Do you have any questions for me >do you…
entry.content: I have arrived in Mexico City, from NYC Do you have any questions for me >do you like it Yes. I like it more than NYC. It's way cheaper and feels more exciting. Both NYC and CDMX have world cup events going on but you can feel CDMX humming with activity due to the game, while in NYC it's more contained in sports bars and whatnot >is it scary / dangerous / dirty It's actually a little cleaner than NYC in the city center lol. But it's definitely more sketchy especially at night and outside of tour
